title: Overwatch Retail Patch Notes - April 14, 2026

changes: Hyper Regeneration – Minor Perk: Now restores barrier health only when damaging enemy heroes.
Experimental Barrier: (6v6) Maximum health reduced from 650 to 600.
Ravenous Vortex: Vengeful Vortex moved from Perk to Baseline ability.
Ravenous Vortex: Projectile now explodes on contact with the ground.
Ravenous Vortex: Explosion can now be manually detonated while airborne.
Ravenous Vortex: Explosion damage reduced from 50 to 15.
Prolonged Barrier – Minor Perk: Added.
Prolonged Barrier – Minor Perk: Void Barrier duration and size increased by 25%.
Vengeful Vortex – Major Perk: Removed.
Void Surge – Major Perk: Moved from Minor to Major Perk.
Shield Slam – Minor Perk: Added a custom setting allowing Shield Slam to be bound to Quick Melee, enabling free look while the perk is equipped.
Scrap Gun: Reload time increased from 1.5 to 1.75 seconds.
Chain Hook: Cooldown increased from 6 to 8 seconds.
Invigorate – Major Perk: Removed.
Hogdrogen Exposure – Major Perk: Added.
Hogdrogen Exposure – Major Perk: Take a Breather now heals nearby allies for 50% of its healing amount.
Tesla Cannon: Deals 50% increased damage to deployables.
(6v6) Base health reduced from 475 to 450. (Total health including armor and shields reduced from 575 to 550.)
Fan the Flames: Impact damage increased from 5 to 6.
Inferno Rush: Impact damage reduced from 50 to 30.
Dancing Blaze: Now heals Anran for 50 health on the first target hit and 25 health for each subsequent target.
Hungering Blaze – Major Perk: Changed.
Hungering Blaze – Major Perk: Increases the healing of Dancing Blaze’s subsequent strikes by 25.
Double Barreled – Minor Perk: Time required to retrigger Coach Gun increased from 1 to 2 seconds.
Configuration Reload – Minor Perk: No longer fully refunds cooldown.
Configuration Reload – Minor Perk: Now reduces cooldown by 4 seconds.
Armored Artillery – Minor Perk: Overhealth degeneration reduced from 100 to 50 per second.
Duplicate: Can now duplicate allied heroes.
Focused Rush – Minor Perk: Range increased from 4 to 6 meters.
Siphon Blaster: Added an accessibility option which allows players to hold Secondary Fire to automatically fire Siphon Blaster at a reduced fire rate.
Heat Sink – Major Perk: Heat generated from direct hits reduced from 100% to 60%.
Mine Recycling – Major Perk: Moved from Minor to Major Perk.
Mine Recycling – Major Perk: Eliminations with Concussion Mine restore one charge.
Bomb Voyage – Minor Perk: Moved from Major to Minor Perk.
Bomb Voyage – Minor Perk: Attack speed bonus reduced from 35% to 25%.
Hover Jets: Bonus movement speed reduced from 40% to 30%.
Barrage: Pharah can now move while using Barrage.
Barrage: Explosion damage reduced from 30 to 25.
Drift Thrusters – Minor Perk: Removed.
Concussive Force – Minor Perk: Added.
Concussive Force – Minor Perk: Concussive Blast deals up to 50 explosion damage.
Dire Triggers: Moved from Perk to Baseline ability.
Dire Triggers: Cooldown increased from 3 to 6 seconds.
Trigger Finger – Major Perk: Added.
Trigger Finger – Major Perk: Using an ability or reloading refreshes Dire Triggers’ cooldown.
Sprint: Can now reload while sprinting.
Sprint: Reloading while sprinting reduces Sprint’s movement speed bonus by 50%, diminishing over the duration.
Sprint: Added a custom setting allowing Sprint to cancel reload.
Agility Training – Major Perk: Removed.
Full Stride – Major Perk: New.
Full Stride – Major Perk: Sprint’s movement speed bonus gradually increases by an additional 25% over 2 seconds.
Stealth: Movement speed bonus reduced by 50% while revealed by damage.
Minor Perk cost reduced by 10%.
Major Perk cost reduced by 7%.
Onslaught (Passive): Movement speed per stack reduced from 4% to 2%.
Palatine Fang: Overhead swing bonus range reduced from 2.5 to 2.0 meters.
Minor Perk cost reduced by 6%.
Major Perk cost reduced by 4%.
Biotic Grenade: Cooldown reduced from 14 to 12 seconds.
Barrier Shield: Health increased from 250 to 300.
Combat Medic – Minor Perk: Cooldown refunded increased from 0.5 to 0.75 seconds.
Frenetic Flight: Acceleration reduced by 11%.
Claws Out – Major Perk: Cooldown reductions now apply to the Claws Out cooldown.
Pulsar Torpedoes: (6v6) Cooldown increased from 10 to 12 seconds.
Glide Boost: Movement speed bonus reduced from 50% to 40%.
Healing Blossom: Maximum healing increased from 80 to 90.
Rejuvenating Dash: Healing increased from 45 to 55.
Life Grip: Now cleanses allies when pulled.
Sow the Seed – Major Perk: Cooldown reduced from 14 to 11 seconds.
Crossfade: (6v6) Healing reduced from 20 to 18.
Accelerando – Major Perk: Changed.
Accelerando – Major Perk: Gain 15% attack speed while Lucio's Speed Song is active, tripled during Amp It Up.
Soundwave Rider – Minor Perk: Can no longer be charged before a round begins.
Swift Step: Teleport range reduced from 35 to 30 meters.
Healing Ofuda: Fire rate increased from 5 to 7 per second.
Remedy Aura: (6v6) Minimum Healing Reduced from 5 to 4.5.
Remedy Aura: (6v6) Maximum Healing reduced from 20 to 18.
Kekkai Sanctuary: No longer spawns if Mizuki is eliminated during the cast time.
Katashiro Return: Can now activate return while other animations are active, excluding Kekkai Sanctuary's cast animation.
Katashiro Return: Movement speed bonus reduced from 35% to 30%.
Flash Heal: Flash Heal moved from Perk to Baseline ability.
Flash Heal: Cooldown reduced from 15 to 12 seconds.
Flash Heal: Base healing increased from 50 to 60.
Flash Heal: Healing multiplier on allies below 50% health reduced from 3x to 2x.
Caduceus Staff: Healing reduced from 60 to 55.
Guardian Angel: Launch speed reduced by 10%.
Double Dose – Major Perk: New.
Double Dose – Major Perk: Flash Heal gains an additional charge but its base healing is reduced by 10.
Rushing Torrent: Duration reduced from 4 to 3.5 seconds.
Orb of Discord: (6v6) Damage amplification reduced from 30% to 25%.
Added to the Stadium roster.
[Void Accelerator] infects enemies with nanites which explode for 20(WP) damage after dealing 100 damage.
[Void Accelerator] periodically releases a burst of 6 additional projectiles during continuous fire.
[Void Barrier] gains an additional charge.
+25% [Void Barrier] size. [Void Accelerator] projectile and [Pummel] that passes through the [Void Barrier] gain 10% increased damage.
Damage Absorbed threshold for Attack Speed reduced to 50 (Down from 100).
Currency from damage and healing increased by 12.5%.
Bounce Damage increased to 75% (Up from 50%).
Critical Damage increased to 200% (Up from 175%).
Added "+25% Starting Ultimate Charge".
Max Ammo restore reduced to 30% (Down from 40%).
Max Life Healing reduced to 6% (Down from 8%).
Removed 5% Weapon Power.
Max Life Overhealth Scaling reduced to 6% (Down from 8%).
Removed 10% Weapon Power.
Ability Power increased to 15% (Up from 10%).
Cooldown Reduction upon self detonating Concussion Mine reduced to 10% (Down from 15%).
Currency from damage and healing increased by 5%.
Whirlwind Dash Damage during additional duration increased to 75% (Up from 50%).
Whirlwind Dash reactivation damage increased to 75% (Up from 50%).
Free Projected Edge damage increased to 75% (Up from 50%).
Mini Sundering Blade damage increased to 50% increased damage (Up from 25%).
Nano Boost Duration increased to 25% (Up from 15%).
Critical Multiplier decreased to 175% (Down from 200%).
Tooltip now correctly states that it also allows you to crit on allies.
New
While affected by [Hyper Ring], [Medi-Blaster] has a fully automatic fire rate.
New
Non-empowered Primary Fire projectile speed increased to 150% (Up from 100%).
Active Restorative Stream self healing increased to 100% (Up from 75%).
Healing based on damage dealt reduced to 30% (Down from 35%).
Homing Health Threshold increased to 50% (Up from 35%).

general_changes: InWeek 1, you will have access toTier 1challenges which grant you progress on your eventRewards Pass.Also available are tougherMetachallenges; these take longer to complete than typical challenges, but completing them nets you better rewards.
Also available are tougherMetachallenges; these take longer to complete than typical challenges, but completing them nets you better rewards.
InWeek 2,Tier 2challenges unlock (provided you've completed allnon-Meta Tier 1challenges).
As you progress your event Rewards Pass, you'll also unlock additionallore entriesand insights that shine a light on the story.
You have all 3 weeks that the event runs to complete everyTier 1,Tier 2, andMetachallenge, giving you plenty of time to snag every reward and unlock alllore pieces.

Tags have been added for New Maps and Reworked Maps. Any map with a New or Reworked tag gives bonus Battle Pass XP in Quick Play and an automatic +10 Competitive Points in Competitive Play. The penalty for losing in Competitive Play on a map with one of these tags is also reduced, so give them a shot and don’t worry as much about losing!
A new Random Map option has been added as a 4th choice. The Random Map will never be one of the 3 visible maps.

When a map has 6 or more votes than any other map it wins by a Landslide, skipping the roll entirely. For example, King’s Row with 7 votes does not win by a Landslide against Dorado with 2 votes, because King’s Row only has 5 more votes than Dorado. 8 votes ensures a Landslide in 5v5 and 9 votes in 6v6. Even the Random Map option can win by a Landslide!

New Attack and Defend icons have been added to map cards for Hybrid and Escort, allowing players in Quick Play to know which side they’ll play if this map wins. In Competitive Play these just let players know which side they’ll play first.
At least 2 different game modes will now be offered across the 3 visible maps.
